titleStmt.title: SII 6.118: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 118. (A.R. No. 158 of 1897). ON A SLAB FIXED INTO THE WALL OF A TANK OPPOSITE THE BHAVANARAYANA TEMPLE AT PONNURU, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Anāmataruyūdhasya tuṁggabha
drānadītaṭē . yētatrailōkyanāthasya
bhāvasya garuḍāṁccitaṁ . bhāva
nārāyaṇaṁ ddēvaṁ bhaktabrāhma
ṇasākṣiṇāṁ . gōṣṭhīvanē munivarai
śśēvyamānamupāsmahē . svasti . surā
suramanujarājēṁdraśēkharīkṛtacaraṇā
raviṁdduṁḍḍunu . saccitānaṁdduṁḍḍunu .
suratarusudhākarasudhārasakama
lādimahāpadā¨rtthasamudbhūti kāraṇō
ddhṛtamaṁddaruṁḍḍunu . trailōkyasuṁddaruṁ
ḍḍunu . prabalatarakaṭhōrāsuravuṁggava
kaṁddharāgahanavipinakuṭhārībhūtadō¨rddaṁ
ḍḍuṁḍḍunu . śakalitaśaṁkarakōdaṁḍḍuṁḍḍunu . nija
caraṇaikaśaraṇadvijōttamavirāhavighnavi
ghātā¨rtthakṛtasaṁnidhānuṁḍḍunu . bhaktaparā
dhinuṁḍḍunu . śṛtipathagōcaramātrapavitri
tajagatrayanijadivyanāmaṁḍḍunu . śrī
gōṣṭhīvananādhuṁḍḍununaina . śrīporanūri
śrībhāvanārāyaṇadēvaraku śāstrā¨rththamu
gānu sā¨rvvakālamunnu puṣpāṁjjali Avadhariṁ
cciyaṭṭugānu śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1338 Agunēṁṭi
du(ṁ)¨rmukhisaṁvvatsara māgha śu 5 sa nāṁḍu kūnavu
li Anavōtānāyiniṁgāru tama tallidaṁḍṛlu guṁḍḍā
nāyiniṁgāriki(ṁ)nni lakkasāniṁgārikinni puṇyamugānu
dha(ṁ)¨rmā[¨r*]ddhakāma mōkṣamulakoṟaku tuṁggabhadra paścama
pravāhamugāṁ bāṟina dakṣiṇabhāgāna niḍuṁbrōli po
lamulōpalanu śrībriṁddāvanamu tōṁṭapalavrikṣālu
sahitamu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkastāyigānu sama¨rppiṁstimi .
svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ pparadattānupālanaṁ . parada
ttāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . svadattāṁ parada
ttāṁ vvā yō harēti vasuṁddharāṁ . ṣaṣṭhi¨rvvaruṣasa
hasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyati krimiḥ . maṁggaḷa
mahāśrīśrīśrīṁ jēyun® .
Digital edition of SII 6.118 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
